description: One decoded text line without its line ending. Line order is controlled by order_key.

id.description: Stable line entity pk. New lines are generated as UUIDv7 strings. Must match the line entity_pk.

order_key.description: Opaque variable-length byte order key encoded as lowercase hex. Lexicographic string order matches line order.

line.description: Decoded line text, excluding the line ending.
